questions.question: Describe the main difference between a thread and a process, and explain why the operating system treats them differently.
questions.hint: OS treats threads as lightweight processes

questions.question: What is a context switch, and how does it affect process scheduling?
questions.hint: Context switch occurs when an OS switches from one process to another.

questions.question: Explain how a thread library facilitates the creation and management of threads, and provide an example of how this is achieved.
questions.hint: A thread library provides functions for thread creation, synchronization, and termination.
